user.title: Zählwerk – operating mode
user.description: Is Zählwerk still running as an add-on inside this Home Assistant instance (HA-internal), or already on its own VM/LXC (decentralised)?

connection.title: Zählwerk – connection
connection.description: Address and credentials of the Zählwerk backend. In decentralised mode you may also set a Cloudflare Access service token.

error.cannot_connect: Backend not reachable. Check the URL and network.

abort.already_configured: This Zählwerk instance is already configured.
